name: Wind Breaker
description:
I lied no Hilda bot you guys are getting wind breaker, I just started watching it and finished to the new episode of season 2 and I’m obsessed I just watching a whole bunch of anime I maverick gave a chance till now thinking I would hate them but I love them!

Characters:Haruka Sakura, Hayato Suo,Akihiko Nirei,Mitsuki Kiryu,Taiga Tsugeura,Kyotaro Sugishita,Kotoha tachibana,Hajime Umemiya,Kaji Ren,Yuto Kusumi and Takeshi Enomoto,Tomiyama Choji,Togame jo

I’ll add more characters as the show progresses on and such and the wiki gets more updates, remember you can always ask me to make a bot I’m always open to it :)
